Temporary workaround: Downgrade to 2026.3.11:

npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.11  ...    loading/initialization. Possible related changes in 2026.3.12: - New plugin architecture (Ollama/vLLM/SGLang provider-plugin migration)

items.summary: The GitHub issue reports a critical bug in OpenClaw version 2026.3.12, where executing basic CLI commands such as `gateway status` or `doctor` causes the application to crash due to a JavaScript heap out-of-memory (OOM) error. This memory leak prevents the CLI from functioning properly after the upgrade, contrasting with the previous version 2026.3.11, which operated normally. The problem appears to be related to increased memory consumption during command execution, leading to crashes shortly after running simple commands. The issue is currently open, indicating that a fix or further investigation is pending.

items.summary: The GitHub issue reports a regression in the openclaw/openclaw project where outbound WhatsApp messaging fails with the error "No active WhatsApp Web listener," despite auto-replies functioning correctly. The problem affects various outbound message pathways, including CLI commands, message tools, and agent sessions, while inbound messages and auto-replies remain operational. The underlying Baileys socket for inbound communication is active, indicating the issue is specific to outbound message handling. This suggests a recent change or regression has disrupted the outbound WhatsApp message-sending capability, requiring further investigation or a bug fix to restore full functionality.

items.title: feat(exec): propagate NO_DNA to child commands · Pull Request #44947 · openclaw/openclaw
highlights:
TypeScript ## feat(exec): propagate NO_DNA to child commands - Author: @beeman
- State: open
- Labels: docs, docker, agents, size: S - Source branch: beeman/no-dna-child-command-propagation
- Target branch: main
- Mergeable: unknown

- Created: 2026-03-13T09:48:41Z
- Updated: 2026-03-13T17:52:55Z ## Summary - Problem: child processes spawned by OpenClaw did not receive the new proposed standard `NO_DNA` marker, so downstream tools could not reliably detect non-human-operated execution. - Why it matters: tools that honor `NO_DNA` can suppress interactive prompts and other human-targeted UX only when that  ...    - What changed: OpenClaw now injects `NO_DNA=1` with `OPENCLAW_CLI=1` into child command environments for exec, node-host/system.run, sandbox, ACP client, and TUI local shell paths; tests and English docs were updated. - What did NOT change (scope boundary): OpenClaw does not set `NO_DNA` on its own parent process, and login-shell env  ...    - [ ] Bug fix

- Closes #N/A

## User-visible / Behavior Changes - Child commands launched by `exec`, node-host/system-run paths, sandbox containers, `openclaw acp client`, and TUI `!`  ...    - Those child commands continue to receive `OPENCLAW_CLI=1`, and path-specific `OPENCLAW_SHELL=*` markers remain intact.  ...    The child-process environment contract changed because supported command runners now export `NO_DNA=1`. The risk is  ...    - How to disable/revert this change quickly: revert this PR/commit, or temporarily remove the child-command `NO_DNA`  ...    https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/exec
https://docs.openclaw.ai/help/environment

> > This PR introduces `NO_DNA=1` propagation into all child-command environments spawned by OpenClaw (exec, node-host, sandbox, ACP client, TUI local shell), while intentionally preserving the parent-process and login-shell probing boundaries where the marker should not appear. The implementation is well-structured: a shared `markOpenClawChildCommandEnv` helper centralizes both `OPENCLAW_CLI=1` and `NO_DNA=1` injection, an opt-out `includeNoDna: false` parameter on `sanitizeHostExecEnv` guards the shell-env probing path, and `ensureOpenClawExecMarkerOnProcess` remains unchanged so the parent OpenClaw process is unaffected.  ...    >

items.summary: This pull request addresses a technical issue in OpenClaw where child processes did not inherit the `NO_DNA` marker, which is used to indicate non-human operation. The update propagates the `NO_DNA=1` environment variable to child commands, enabling downstream tools to reliably detect automated or script-driven execution. This fix enhances automation and scripting reliability by ensuring consistent recognition of non-human processes, thereby improving overall stability and usability.

items.summary: This pull request introduces support for the ModelScope API in the openclaw project, enabling users to access community-supported models via an API key. It involves 3 commits with 499 lines added across 21 files, primarily enhancing the CLI and agent functionalities. Users must obtain a ModelScope API key and link their Alibaba Cloud account to utilize this feature. The update facilitates integration of additional models, improving flexibility and expanding the platform's capabilities.

highlights:

- State: open
- Labels: bug, regression
- Reactions: 👍 1
- Created: 2026-03-13T06:57:27Z - Updated: 2026-03-14T02:23:13Z ### Bug type

Regression (worked before, now fails)

### Summary OpenClaw 2026.3.12 crashes on startup for any config using an Anthropic primary model due to a temporal dead zone (TDZ) initialization error in applyContextPruningDefaults. ### Steps to reproduce

1. Install or upgrade to openclaw@2026.3.12 via npm install -g openclaw@2026.3.12 2. Ensure openclaw.json has an Anthropic primary model (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6)  ...  at normalizeProviderModelId (...:163886:39) at normalizeModelRef (...:163899:10) 
 at parseModelRef (...:163910:9) 
 at aplyContextPruningDefaults (...:4677:26)  ...    ### OpenClaw version

2026.3.12 (6472949)

### Operating system

macOS 26.2 (arm64)

### Install method npm install -g openclaw (global npm)

### Model

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6

### Provider / routing chain Anthropic direct API key (anthropic:default profile, mode: api_key)

### Config file / key location  ...    OpenRouter configured as fallback provider (openrouter/openai/gpt-5.4). Brave Search enabled. No custom contextPruning  ...    2026-03-12T06:03:12.263-07:00 [gateway] signal SIGTERM received  ...    ### Impact and severity - Severity: Critical - Impact: Gateway fails to start entirely for any user with an Anthropic primary model in config. Affects LaunchAgent (persistent service) installs — gateway exits immediately on launch and cannot recover without manual downgrade. ### Additional information - Last known good version: 2026.3.11 (29dc654) — confirmed working  ...    - Root cause analysis: applyContextPruningDefaults (line ~4677 in auth-profiles-iXW75sRj.js) unconditionally calls  ...    is initialized (TDZ). Fix: guard the call with a null/alias check or defer until after module init completes. ---

items.summary: The issue pertains to a regression in openclaw version 2026.3.12, where the application crashes on startup when configured with an Anthropic primary model. The crash is caused by a temporal dead zone (TDZ) initialization error related to 'ANTHROPIC_MODEL_ALIASES' in the function applyContextPruningDefaults. To reproduce, install the specific version, configure with an Anthropic model, and run openclaw commands; the application fails to start. This bug impacts startup stability and configuration loading, highlighting a need for a bug fix or performance update to resolve the TDZ error and restore normal operation.

- Updated: 2026-03-13T13:58:10Z In environments where native `title` attribute tooltips are sluggish or completely ignored (e.g. macOS desktop wrappers losing immediate hover focus), the top right Chat Controls (Refresh, Thinking Mode, Focus, Hide Cron) provide zero user feedback about what they do. This PR migrates these 4 specific icons away from `title=` into `data-tooltip=` with a custom pure CSS animation layer  ...    1. They display almost instantly (0.1s delay) avoiding the typical OS ~1-2s delay. 2. The browser accessibility is preserved via fallback `aria-label=` for screen readers. ---

Each button is wrapped in a ` ` so that hover events work even when the inner button is disabled — a correct and clean fix for the disabled-button pointer-events limitation. Label strings are factored into named constants before the template, avoiding duplication.  ...    therefore never receive keyboard focus. items.summary: This pull request introduces a technical update to the OpenClaw WebUI by replacing native `title` attribute tooltips on chat control icons (Refresh, Thinking Mode, Focus, Hide Cron) with custom, CSS-based tooltips using `data-tooltip`. This change addresses issues on environments like macOS desktop wrappers where native tooltips are sluggish or ignored, improving user feedback and interface responsiveness. The update involves 81 lines of code across three files, enhancing tooltip visibility and consistency through a pure CSS animation layer that aligns with the app's theme. It is part of ongoing development, currently in an unstable merge state, aimed at improving user experience and interface clarity.

items.title: 开源了一个 OpenClaw 运维工具 - V2EX
highlights:
已注册用户请 登录 V2EX› OpenClaw

# 开源了一个 OpenClaw 运维工具

gymayong· 1 天前 · 652 次点击 开源了一个 OpenClaw 运维工具，让安装配置从「折腾半天」变成「 3 条命令搞定」。 ```
 痛点大家都懂：
 - Node.js 版本不对装不上
 - 配置文件改来改去
 - 插件装完不知道安不安全
 - 服务跑没跑起来全靠猜

 simple-openclaw 解决了这些问题： ✅ 一键安装 — 自动装 Node.js 、构建工具、OpenClaw
 ✅ 交互式向导 — dialog 界面，选选填填就配好了
 ✅ 支持国内中转 API — 直接配 base-url 就能用 ✅ 插件安全扫描 — 扫源码找 eval 、挖矿代码、环境变量窃取
 ✅ 安全审计 + 一键加固 — 文件权限、密钥泄露、网络暴露全检查
 ✅ 完整备份/恢复/回滚  ...    git clone https://github.com/majiajue/simple-openclaw.git
 cd simple-openclaw
./bin/simple-openclaw setup 纯 Bash 实现，零依赖，Linux/macOS 通用。

 GitHub： https://github.com/majiajue/simple-openclaw

 觉得有用请 star ⭐，也欢迎提 PR ！

``` 3 条回复 • 2026-03-13 10:19:00 +08:00

items.summary: The webpage announces the open-sourcing of "simple-openclaw," a comprehensive DevOps tool designed to simplify server deployment and maintenance. It automates installation of Node.js, build tools, and OpenClaw with a single command, featuring an interactive setup wizard, support for domestic API proxies, and security features such as plugin safety scans and vulnerability assessments. The tool offers backup, restore, and rollback capabilities, all implemented in pure Bash for Linux/macOS compatibility, with no dependencies. While the page emphasizes ease of use and security, it does not provide detailed architecture diagrams, API documentation, benchmarks, or performance optimization specifics. For technical discussion, architecture analysis, or performance insights, further detailed documentation or source code review would be necessary.

items.summary: This pull request addresses a bug where users skipping authentication during onboarding would encounter a non-functional agent without any warning. To improve user experience and prevent confusion, the update adds a warning message via `prompter.note()` informing users that no API key is configured and guiding them on how to add one later. The change ensures users are aware of the skipped auth step, though the option to skip remains available. This fix enhances reliability and user guidance without impacting the existing skip-auth functionality.

highlights:
Script ## [Bug] v2026.3.11: doctor --fix loops false legacy cron payload kind normalization - Author: @Mdx2025
- State: closed (completed)
- Created: 2026-03-12T07:25:54Z - Updated: 2026-03-13T03:12:37Z
- Closed: 2026-03-13T03:12:37Z
- Closed by: @obviyus ## Summary `openclaw doctor --fix` reports legacy cron payload kind normalization repeatedly on v2026.3.11, even when all jobs  ...    ## Impact - False-positive health warning persists.
- `doctor --fix` appears to "repair" the same jobs on every run.  ...    - OpenClaw: `v2026.3.11`
- Install path: global pnpm package (`openclaw@2026.3.11`) - Gateway: local systemd service, loopback bind  ...    ## Root-cause analysis (local) In the compiled update runner, `normalizePayloadKind(payload)` reports mutation when no effective change is required in  ...    ## Local workaround (confirmed)

Patched local compiled files: - `dist/update-runner-CsfK3SMx.js`
- `dist/update-runner-CvNIx6g2.js`

After patch: - `openclaw doctor --fix` no longer reports legacy kind normalization.  ...    ## Notes Workaround is local and gets overwritten on update/reinstall. A canonical source fix in release artifacts would be ideal. ---

Observe warning similar to:

> > That PR landed the root-cause fix in `src/cron/store-migration.ts` so canonical `payload.kind` values no longer trigger false legacy warnings, while whitespace-padded and non-canonical variants still normalize correctly. Closing  ...    **obviyus** closed this · Mar 13, 20
items.summary: The GitHub issue reports that in OpenClaw version v2026.3.11, running `doctor --fix` repeatedly flags a legacy cron payload kind normalization issue, even when all jobs already have correct `payload.kind` values (`agentTurn` or `systemEvent`). This results in persistent false-positive health warnings and causes the tool to attempt repairs on the same jobs each time, creating unnecessary noise during validation and automation processes. The issue was identified and closed by maintainers, indicating a fix or resolution has been implemented.
